    "Circuit breaker installed in panelboard is not the type listed/approved for the panel.",
    "Wrong breaker type violates panel listing and NEC 240 overcurrent protection requirements.",
    "Breaker-to-bus compatibility and termination temperature ratings are not assured."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Remove the incorrect breaker and install the manufacturer-specified breaker type for the panel.",
    "Verify breaker catalog number is on panelboard label or OEM documentation.",
    "Confirm conductor termination temperature ratings per NEC 110.14(C).",
    "Re-torque terminations and re-inspect before close-out."
  ],
  "rationale": "NEC 240 requires overcurrent devices to be used within their listed ratings and only in equipment for which they are listed. Installing the wrong breaker type for the panel violates the panel listing and creates a high risk of overheating, arcing, or failure at the bus/termination. The work is non-compliant and must be corrected before acceptance.",
  "references": [
    "NEC 240",
    "NEC 110.14(C)"
  ]
}
